content.en:
"Elder Tian, what do you think our Eagle Department should decide?"

He Lao asked.

Ye Tian was silent, he actually didn't have a perfect plan, no matter how he chose, it would be a disaster for the Eagle Department, and if he didn't get it, he would be wiped out directly.

"Elder Tian, you decide, no matter what the choice is, I agree!"

He Lao Dao, he really didn't have the courage to choose.

At this time, Ye Tiandao: "Old He, I'll investigate the situation and then decide how to choose." "

"Good!"

He Lao nodded.

Immediately, a replica body of Ye Tian went to investigate.

After he continued to infiltrate one tribe after another, and probed for information, he learned one thing, that is, the dragon disciple tribe recruited many tribes to fight against the Golden God Department together.

Moreover, he also understood the behavior of the Golden God Ministry, if he really fought for the Golden God Ministry's "417", he would really be used as cannon fodder.

Even if he can survive, the emperor and king levels of the Eagle Department will all be wiped out, and there will be no benefits.

If you take refuge in the Dragon Disciple Tribe, even if you offend the Golden God Ministry, but the Golden God Department is not yet free to liquidate the Eagle Ministry, and there are many tribes that have taken refuge in the Dragon Disciple Tribe, and the Golden God Department must at least defeat the Dragon Disciple Tribe before it has time to liquidate.

And if you take refuge in the dragon disciple tribe, you may be able to get some benefits.

Of course, the Dragon Disciple Tribe is still in a weak position now, and it has to add some foundation to the Dragon Disciple Tribe before it can hope to fight against the Golden God Ministry.

At this time, he thought of Haru, an ancient demon-level existence.

......

Valley of the Void Demons.

Ye Tian came here again as the duplicate body that he had copied.

"You're here again, isn't your body coming?"

Haru was a little excited.

"My body didn't come!" Ye Tian said.

As soon as these words came out, Haru was suddenly a little disappointed, but then Ye Tian's words surprised him.

"Although I can't save you out, but now that the Golden God Department is about to start a war with the Dragon Disciple Tribe, maybe the Dragon Disciple Tribe can save you out. "

Ye Tian said.

"Dragonsman tribe?" Haru frowned slightly, "This is just an ordinary tribe, and even if the Dragondisciple tribe gives birth to a few ancient demon levels, if the strength is too weak, it will still be difficult to rescue me!"

Ye Tian said with a smile: "Several ancient demon levels of the Dragon Disciple Tribe are indeed very weak, but the Dragon Disciple Tribe has taken refuge in the peak ancient demon level existence of Proz, if Proz comes to save you, it should be easy to rescue you." It's just that you need to take refuge in Proz and fight against the Golden God. Whether you'd rather wait for me to rescue you, or let Ploz rescue you, the choice is yours!"

"Sky Eater Lopoloz!!"

Haru was shocked.

He didn't expect this to wake up, and the dragon tribe took refuge in the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon Ploze.

The Heaven Devouring Demon Dragon Proz is a very ancient peak ancient demon-level existence, and in the time of Proz, the Golden God Department was actually very weak, and there was no peak ancient demon-level existence.

Of course, no one knows how powerful the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon is, but it is indeed an object that can be taken refuge in.

"I choose to join Ploz and fight against the Golden God Ministry!"

Haru said.

He didn't want to wait any longer, and took refuge in Proz, and the Golden God Department absolutely couldn't help himself, and he didn't want to seal himself again.

"Okay, I'll contact the Dragons tribe!"

Ye Tian immediately left.

......

Tribe of Dragons.

Ye Tian came to join the Dragon Disciple Tribe on behalf of the Eagle Tribe, and soon a top king of the Dragon Disciple Tribe came to receive Ye Tian.

After all, the Eagle Department also has an emperor-level, and the dragon disciple tribe can still look at it, but it is impossible to let the emperor-level receive Ye Tian, and it is enough to send a top king-level over.

Seeing this king-level, Ye Tian said: "On behalf of the Eagle Tribe, I defected to the Dragon Disciple Tribe, and sent a copy of the information that the ancient demon level was sealed by the Golden God Tribe. "

Ancient Demon Level!

As soon as he heard this, the king immediately informed the above.

Soon.

Long Shu, an ancient demon-level existence, came over, saw Ye Tian, and asked, "Do you know the information that the ancient demon-level existence was sealed by the Golden God Department?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded, "Not far from our Eagle Department, there is a Void Demon Valley, and what is sealed in the Void Demon Valley is the Ancient Demon Level Existence Haru, and the Eagle Department is responsible for guarding the Void Demon Valley, if you rescue Haru, the Ancient Demon Level, he will take refuge in Lord Proz!"

"The ancient demon level existence is Haru, it turned out to be this one, but I didn't expect him to be sealed in the Void Demon Valley!"

Long Shu had heard of Haru, an ancient demon-level existence, but he didn't know where the Sealed Land was located.

In fact, there were only a few people in the Eagle Department who knew about the existence of this ancient demon level before, and it was too normal for the tribes in the outside world to not know0....

"Very well, if this is true, your Eagle Department has made a great contribution. "

Long Shu said excitedly.

Ye Tian said again: "Lord Longshu Ancient Demon, that Ancient Demon-level Haru has been sealed, it is not easy for ordinary Ancient Demon-level beings to break the seal, it is best to let Lord Proz take action, otherwise once the seal cannot be broken, and let the Golden God Department know, come as soon as possible, then there will be no way to rescue Haru!"

Long Shu's face was solemn, it was definitely not easy to be able to seal Haru's seal, he originally planned to go over and take a look for himself, but now it seems that he must let Lord Proz take action directly to put an end to all hidden dangers.

Haru's strength must be above him, and if they have an ancient demon-level existence like Haru, they will have more hope to fight against the Golden God Ministry.

Thereupon.

Long Shu went to meet Master Proz as soon as possible.

Deep in the Golden God Department.

Proz had moved here, and the dragon soon met with Master Proz.

Long Shu said respectfully.

Ploz opened his eyes and said, "What's the matter?"

Immediately, Long Shu told Lu about the matter.

"Haru, yes, I'll go rescue him. "

Pleoz is also well aware of the importance of his subordinates, and now that he has just awakened, if he wants to occupy a territory, he will inevitably fight with the Golden God Department.

Therefore, one more Gu Demon-level subordinate is qualified to negotiate with the Golden God Ministry.

Thereupon. 2.1

Pleoz immediately shuttled through the Ultimate Void, and in a few breaths came to the Valley of the Void Demons.

When Plotz's massive body covered the Valley of the Void Demons, Haru saw Plotz.

"Haru has seen Lord Plotz!"

Haru said excitedly.

"Will you surrender to me?"

Pleoz asked.

"Yes!"

Haru nodded.

Immediately.

Proz shattered those sealing enchantments with one claw, ripped off all the sealing chains on Haru's body, and pulled Haru out.

Suddenly, Haru lifted the seal.

"Let's go, let's go back!"

Plotz left with Haru.

And with the addition of Haru, the strength of the dragon disciple tribe has grown a lot, and the fight against the Golden God Department naturally has more certainty.
